bullets.text: Project 1: Predicting Breast Cancer Mortality Trends Using Socioeconomic Indicators and Risk Factor Data with a Machine Learning Based Methodology
children: Developed an end-to-end machine learning pipeline combining CatBoost, Random Forest, and LSTM to forecast breast cancer mortality trends across diverse socio-economic contexts.
Implemented advanced preprocessing techniques (feature selection, anomaly detection, power transformation) and applied post-hoc bias correction to enhance model accuracy and reliability.
Conducted SHAP analysis to interpret feature contributions, providing actionable insights into socio-economic drivers of breast cancer mortality for evidence-based policy planning.

bullets.text: Project 2: Machine Learning Framework for Water Quality Prediction in Karnaphuli River Basin
children: Predicted salinity levels in the Karnaphuli River Basin to inform local water-management strategies.
Developed and validated hybrid ML models (XGBoost, AdaBoost, Stacking ensemble, ANN) to predict river water salinity using secondary data from CUET’s Department of Civil Engineering.

Achieved high predictive accuracy with cross-validated metrics: ANN (R² = 0.98, RMSE = 0.84), Stacking Model (R² = 0.96, RMSE = 1.31), XGBoost (R² = 0.95, RMSE = 1.33), and AdaBoost (R² = 0.95, RMSE = 1.38).

projects.title: Brain Tumor Schematic Segmentation
projects.subtitle: U-Net & CNN Variants
bullets: Implemented image segmentation techniques for brain tumor detection using deep learning architectures.
Utilized U-Net and CNN variants for precise pixel-wise segmentation tasks.
Applied preprocessing, augmentation, and evaluation metrics for model optimization and validation.

projects.title: Road Lane Detection Using Mask R-CNN
projects.subtitle: Mask R-CNN with a ResNet-101 backbone
bullets: Developed a deep learning pipeline using Mask R-CNN with a ResNet-101 backbone on a custom COCO-format dataset.
Implemented instance segmentation for detecting and classifying seven categories of road lane markings.
Improved segmentation accuracy for complex road environments and lane structures.

projects.title: Rainfall Prediction with Remote Sensing Simulated Data
projects.subtitle: ResNet-LSTM framework
bullets: Developed a hybrid ResNet-LSTM framework for rainfall prediction using remote sensing simulated datasets.
Applied LIME for interpretable machine learning and local explanation analysis.
Evaluated temporal and spatial rainfall prediction performance using deep sequential architectures.

projects.title: Salinity Prediction Using ANN
projects.subtitle: Ensemble machine learning & deep ANN architectures
bullets: Implemented ensemble machine learning methods alongside deep ANN architectures for salinity prediction.
Conducted preprocessing, model training, and comparative performance analysis.

projects.title: RNN Time-Series Classification
projects.subtitle: Recurrent Neural Networks
bullets: Cleaned and preprocessed sequential datasets including imputation and exploratory visualization.
Applied recurrent neural networks for time-series forecasting and classification tasks.

projects.title: Dimension Reduction and Clustering
projects.subtitle: PCA, UMAP, t-SNE, LLE, K-means, DBSCAN, HDBSCAN
bullets: Applied dimensionality reduction algorithms including PCA, UMAP, t-SNE, and LLE.
Implemented clustering methods such as K-means, DBSCAN, and HDBSCAN for unsupervised learning analysis.

activities.title: President
activities.subtitle: Programming Club, Department of Statistics
bullets: Helped foster a research environment in the University of Chittagong’s first DATA-based IT club.
Conducted workshops on programming and statistical analysis topics.
Established collaborative learning initiatives focused on applied statistics and AI research.

activities.title: Associate Secretary
activities.subtitle: Leo Club of Chittagong
bullets: Led volunteer initiatives and organized many collaborative events.
Delegated operational responsibilities among team members for efficient management.

activities.title: Undergraduate Research Ambassador
activities.subtitle: Uthshorgo Undergraduate Research Ambassadors’ Program
bullets: Mentored undergraduate students in conducting research projects.
Organized research workshops and seminars to foster a scholarly community.
Collaborated with faculty and staff to develop research resources.
